root.name: Create flowchart representing 'Left Hand Side → Right Hand Side → Balance' on slide 3
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully added a 'Fade' transition effect to slide 2 without extraneous modifications.

children.name: Correct transition type added to slide 2
children.description: Checks if slide 2 has a newly added transition of type 'Fade'.
children.reason: No transitions were added or modified.

children.name: Transition parameters appropriate (duration, direction)
children.description: Checks if the 'Fade' transition added to slide 2 has reasonable parameters (duration and direction).
children.reason: No 'Fade' transition found on slide 2 to check parameters.

children.name: No extraneous transitions added to other slides
children.description: Checks that no transitions were added to slides other than slide 2.
children.reason: No extraneous transitions were added to other slides.

children.name: No extraneous modifications (animations, slides, transitions)
children.description: Checks that there were no unintended modifications to animations, slides, or transitions elsewhere in the presentation.

root.reason: The criterion received a failing score because the agent completely failed to add the required 'Fade' transition effect to slide 2, which was the core task being evaluated. While the agent avoided making unwanted changes to other parts of the presentation, the critical requirement of actually implementing the fade transition was not met at all. Since adding the correct transition type was marked as critical and the agent didn't perform this essential action, the overall criterion could not pass regardless of the other positive aspects.

metadata.task: Add a slide transition effect of 'Fade' to slide 2
